contexts.context: The fiddle now gave the signal for the <mark>Bourrée</mark> (a provincial dance), Athénaïs was engaged to dance...
"My child, I forbid your dancing la <mark>bourrée</mark> with any one but M. de Lansac."
...trill of the fiddle, executed before beginning la <mark>bourrée</mark>, every gentleman, by immemorial custom, salutes...
